name: Aurora
description: Curtains of polar light leaning across an arctic night — every redraw lets the veils drift, tilt and trade their glow.

code.style: --veil1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --veil2: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --vx: @rand(-6%, 30%); --vx2: @rand(30%, 64%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: var(--vx); top: @rand(-12%, 8%); width: @rand(16%, 30%); height: @rand(80%, 116%); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--veil1); filter: blur(calc(60px / @Y)); opacity: @rand(0.4, 0.8); transform: skewX(@rand(-16deg, 16deg)); transition: ease 900ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: var(--vx2); top: @rand(-8%, 12%); width: @rand(12%, 24%); height: @rand(70%, 108%); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--veil2); filter: blur(calc(70px / @Y)); opacity: @rand(0.3, 0.7); transform: skewX(@rand(-18deg, 18deg)); transition: ease 900ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
